links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-crowned greenlet (Hylophilus poicilotis) is a species of bird in the family Vireonidae, the vireos, greenlets, and shrike-babblers . It is found in Argentina, Brazil, Paraguay, and possibly Bolivia.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The rufous-crowned greenlet is found in southeastern Brazil from southern Mato Grosso do Sul south into Rio Grande do Sul, across eastern Paraguay, and into northeastern Argentina's Misiones Province. In addition, the South American Classification Committee has unconfirmed reports from Bolivia. It inhabits moist to humid forest, woodlands, scrublands, and mature secondary forest.
